title: Codex Marketplace Schema
description: Schema for the generated .agents/plugins/marketplace.json — the Codex-target counterpart to .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, listing only Codex-enabled plugins with no version field (R5).
$comment: Repo-derived schema, not an official OpenAI schema, from the July 2026 Codex plugin contract. The per-entry shape (name, source.{source,path}, category, policy.{installation,authentication}) is empirically verified in docs/research/2026-07-16-codex-plugin-contract-spike.md's 'Incidental observations' ('.agents/plugins/marketplace.json with version-less entries ... installs and lists'). The interface.displayName nesting is confirmed against a live fetch of learn.chatgpt.com/docs/build-plugins on 2026-07-19 ('Use top-level `name` to identify the marketplace. Use `interface.displayName` for the marketplace title shown in the ChatGPT desktop app.') — supersedes the prior root-level displayName field, which was inferred from R5's wording and not independently spiked.

plugins.description: Filtered to Codex-enabled plugins only, in catalog canonical order (R5). May be empty (the committed empty-state artifact before any plugin enables Codex).

path.description: Marketplace-relative path to the plugin directory, e.g. './plugins/<name>'.

CodexPluginEntry.description: No version field — additionalProperties:false above already rejects one; the Codex marketplace snapshot is version-less by design (R5, R12).
